items.text:
Dil ne jo chaha woh fasana na hua Waqt ka dariya bhi rawana na hua 
Hum dhoondte rahe khudi ko umr bhar
Aur khud se milne ka zamana na hua

Rait pe likhi hui taqdeer the hum
Lehron ki bas ek si tasveer the hum
Duniya ne samjha humein mitti ka khilona —Toote toh jaana ki zanjeer the hum

Mitti ki thandi si god mein so jayenge
Naam ke patthar pe hum bhi kho jayenge
Aaj jo chalte hain sar utha kar duniya mein —
Kal qabr ke saaye mein chup ho jayenge

Samandar sa tha woh, main kinara na bana
Uski khamoshi ko bhi ishara na bana
Log kehte rahe ishq aasaan hai magar —
Main doobta hi raha, woh sahara na bana

Baap ke kandhon pe kabhi aasman dekha tha
Maa ke haathon mein pura jahaan dekha tha
Hum bade kya hue, sab kuch chhota lagne laga —
Warna ghar ke kone mein hi armaan dekha tha

Gir kar bhi jo rukne ka hunar rakhte hain
Andheron mein bhi jalne ka safar rakhte hain
Qismat bhi badal jaati hai un logon ki —
Jo haathon mein mehnat ka asar rakhte hain

Bazm-e-hayat mein kamyab-e-wafa kaun hua
Har ek dost yahan daawa-e-sada kaun hua
Waqt ki dhoop ne sab chehre badal daale —
Jo saaya ban ke raha, bas wahi apna kaun hua

Waqt ne har cheez ko dhool kar diya
Kal ka har ek khwab fazool kar diya
Hum samjhe the hum rok lenge lamhon ko —
Waqt ne humein hi be-usool kar diya

Khudi ka raaz na har aaina bata paaya
Main apne aap se mil kar bhi na samajh paaya
Jab chhod diye maine jahaan ke saare sahare —
Tab apne andar hi ek naya jahaan paaya

Sabr ne dard ko gehra bana diya
Khamoshi ne har gham ko chhupa diya
Hum jalte rahe aandhiyon ke darmiyaan —
Sabr ne hi chiraagh ko zinda bana diya

Taqdeer pe chhoda toh bikharte rahe hum
Mehnat ki toh raaston pe ubharte rahe hum
Qismat bhi jhuki dekh kar hausla apna —
Gir gir ke har baar sanwarte rahe hum

Tanhaai ne dil se har shor mita diya
Khud se milne ka raasta dikha diya
Logon ki mehfil mein jo kho jaate the hum —
Tanhaai ne humein hum se mila diya

Khamoshi ne dil ka bayan likh diya
Be-awaaz dard ka nishaan likh diya
Jo keh na sake hum zamane bhar se —
Khamoshi ne sab kuch ayaan likh diya

Dehleez-e-ghar par waqt thehar jata tha
Har zakhm wahan jaa ke bikhar jata tha
Duniya ne humein kya se kya kar diya warna —
Ghar laut ke bachpan sa nikhar jata tha

Bachpan ki galiyon ka nasha yaad aaya
Mitti ka woh khilona sada yaad aaya
Hum daudte the be-khauf zamaane se kabhi —
Ab har kadam pe woh Khuda yaad aaya

Zimmedari ne khamosh bana diya humein
Andar hi andar bada diya humein
Kal tak jo hansi baantte phirte the —
Waqt ne soch mein dooba diya humein

Khwabon ka mahal tha, hawa le gayi
Aankhon ki chamak thi, sada le gayi
Hum samjhe the haqeeqat se door rahenge —
Zindagi khwab tod kar jaga le gayi

Wafa ki raah mein aksar imtihaan aaye
Jo apne the wahi badal ke anjaan aaye
Hum ne toh nibhayi thi dil se har ek baat —
Magar wafa ke badle sirf armaan aaye

Safar ki gard mein chehra naya hota gaya
Har mod pe dil aur tanha hota gaya
Hum manzil ki tamanna mein chalte hi rahe —
Aur raasta khud hi rehnuma hota gaya

Insaaniyat lafzon se aage ki baat hai
Dil se nikle toh hi koi mulaqat hai
Warna chehre pe muskaan sab rakhte hain —
Sachcha insaan woh hai jisme rehmat ki zaat hai

Guroor ki chaadar mein lipta raha aadmi
Apni hi parwaaz mein bhatakta raha aadmi
Jab waqt ne hawa ka rukh badal diya —
Zameen pe gir kar haqeeqat samajhta raha aadmi

Umeed ka noor dil mein utarta raha
Har dard andheron mein nikharta raha
Raat ne lakh chhupaya savere ko lekin —
Umeed ka suraj kahin se ubharta raha

Haar ne har qadam pe parakhna sikhaya
Gir kar bhi khud ko sambhalna sikhaya
Jeet toh bas ek lamhe ki mehmaan bani —
Haar ne umr bhar ka chalna sikhaya

Yaadon ki dhool mein chehre chamak uthte hain
Guzre hue lamhe phir se dhadak uthte hain
Waqt ke daaman mein sab kho jaata hai lekin —
Kuch ehsaas hain jo umr bhar jag uthte hain

Khauf-e-waqt se har lamha phisal jaata hai
Haath aata hua pal bhi nikal jaata hai
Hum samajhte hain ke jee lenge kal fursat se —
Aur kal aate hi phir aaj badal jaata hai

Khud se hi roz ek jung si hoti hai
Dil aur aql mein tang si hoti hai
Jeet bhi jaaun toh sukoon milta nahi —
Yeh haar bhi ajeeb rang si hoti hai

Haqeeqat-e-zindagi khwab si lagti hai
Har khushi lamhon ki mehmaan si lagti hai
Hum pakadna chahte hain waqt ko lekin —
Zindagi ret ki maanind phisalti hai

Fani hai har ek shay, yeh ehsaas raha
Har rang-e-hayat pal bhar ka libaas raha
Hum baqa dhoondte rahe naqshon mein lekin —
Jo mit kar bhi reh gaya, bas wohi khaas raha

Wajood ka raaz har soch se pare nikla
Main jitna samjha, utna hi dhundla nikla
Duniya mein dhoondta raha apni pehchaan —
Khud mein utara toh ek aur hi dariya nikla

Hasrat ka dhuaan dil mein uthta hi raha
Jo mil na saka, woh hi dikhta hi raha
Hum ne toh chhoda bhi kai baar magar —
Dil usi khwab ko pakadta hi raha

Nadamat ka bojh dil uthata raha
Guzra hua har lamha sataata raha
Jo keh na sake the waqt ke saamne —
Khamosh sa woh alfaaz rulata raha

Ilm ka samandar bhi kam padta gaya
Har jawab ke saath sawaal badhta gaya
Hikmat ne bas itna sa raaz khola —
Jo jhuk ke chala, wahi samajhta gaya

Dil kuch aur kahe, aql samjhati rahi
Ek aag si andar hi jalati rahi
Hum faisla kar na sake umr bhar —
Aql jeet'ti rahi, rooh harati rahi

Faqr ne sikhaya halka safar karna
Dil ko har ek bojh se be-asar karna
Jab chhod diye maine duniya ke sahare —
Tab seekha khud pe hi nazar karna

Uski yaad ka diya jalta hi raha
Dil khamosh tha magar dhalta hi raha
Woh door thi, phir bhi ajeeb sa asar —
Har lamha usi ki taraf chalta hi raha

Uski aankhon mein ajeeb sa jahaan tha
Khamosh magar har baat ka bayaan tha
Hum dekhte rahe aur doobte chale gaye —
Woh ek nazar hi mera imtihaan tha

Faasla badha toh ehsaas gehra hua
Woh door tha magar dil se thehra hua
Hum samjhe the doori mita degi sab kuch —
Door reh kar bhi woh aur mera hua

Na-mukammal si kahani reh gayi
Dil mein ek khamosh nishani reh gayi
Hum keh na sake aur woh samajh na saka —
Bas darmiyan ek zindagani reh gayi

Woh mila toh soch badal si gayi
Dil ki har ek raah nikal si gayi
Hum pehle bhi jee rahe the lekin —
Uske baad zindagi sambhal si gayi
Woh jo mila tha, ek khamosh kahani ban gaya Dil mein basa aur phir yaad purani ban gaya Main rok na saka usko waqt ki tarah lekin — Woh ja kar bhi meri zindagani ban gaya
